name: Rogz Dog Utility Control Collar Web Medium - Pink
description: Rogz Control Collar Web is a safe, non-slip collar recommended for behaviour correction and training. Through gently-applied pressure, when attached to a Lead/Leash, the two D-rings are drawn together, tightening slightly to prevent your dog from reversing out of the collar. TO FIT: To avoid injury, fit the collar with a two-finger gap between the metal rings in the tightened position. The collar should then fit snuggly over your dog?s head. Size: Medium 16mm (Neck Size: 35 - 45cm)
